title: Front Office Manager - IRCTC Tourism - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - IRCTC Tourism - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IRCTC Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IRCTC Tourism:
IRCTC Tourism is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Tourism!
